question: Did Pfizer grow its PPNE between FY20 and FY21?
answer:
Yes, Pfizer grew its Property, Plant and Equipment, net (PP&E) between FY20 and FY21.

Applying the definition from the retrieved chunks, PP&E is stated as the net value after accumulated depreciation. According to [PAGE 88], the net PP&E balance increased from $13,745 million as of December 31, 2020, to $14,882 million as of December 31, 2021. This increase is also reflected on the consolidated balance sheet [PAGE 59].
